channel.title: NUZU News
channel.description: NUZU: Real News in Real Time. Breaking headlines from 200+ trusted sources.

item.title: Meloni bashes Brussels for financial flexibility amid energy crunch - Euronews.com
Northern Ireland's former unionist leader faces trial in sexual abuse case involving 2 girls - The Washington Post
‘That’s America’ - How USMNT’s NYC rooftop roster reveal made the World Cup finally feel real - Goal.com
Alabama asks Supreme Court to allow use of congressional map helping GOP, despite racial bias ruling - The Washington Post
US Supreme Court settles long-running water dispute over dwindling Rio Grande - The Washington Post
Israel's military tells residents across southern Lebanon to leave as it fights Hezbollah - The Washington Post
UC Berkeley bans AI use for law students - Semafor
U.S. needs years to rebuild weapons stockpiles depleted in Iran war, report says - Haaretz
World Cup on Peacock: Spanish language coverage, subscription costs, free trials, deals and more - Goal.com
Robinhood allows users to use AI agents to trade stocks - Semafor
French Open 2026 results: Francesca Jones beaten by Marie Bouzkova - BBC
Ex-UFC champs Teixeira, Rua set for boxing match in Brazil … - theScore
Is Another Holocaust Around the Corner? - The Times of Israel
Billington CyberSecurity Cyber and AI Outlook Series Episode 6: Securing AI for National Security: Defending Federal and Military AI Systems from Emerging Cyber Threats - Federal News Network
YouTube to begin automatically labeling AI videos - Ars Technica
NBA Legend's Son Named No. 1 in 2029 CBB Prospect Rankings by ESPN - Bleacher Report
Haredi Party Leader Orders Boycott of Israel Police Over Arrests of Draft Evaders - Haaretz
Israel: Police Officer From Elite Unit Questioned Over Alleged Contact With Iranian Agents - i24NEWS
Indian man moves back after US layoff and visa stress: ‘Immigration system breaks you down’ - Hindustan Times

The ‘Kevin’ team - Kevin, Aubrey Plaza, Joe Wengert, and Dan Murphy - joined us in the Deadline Studio at Prime Experience More from this event coming soon - stay tuned! #PrimeFYC Photos: @anthonyavellano - facebook.com
China’s Rise and the Challenge to US Maritime Security - The Diplomat – Asia-Pacific
Japan's farmed salmon taps into growing appetite at home and abroad - Nikkei Asia
Kelly blazes trail for Blaze after Ballinger snares Bears - ESPNcricinfo
Jennifer Lopez Reacts to Office Romance Costar Brett Goldstein Fangirling Over Her - E! News
Realtracs may suspend Zillow listing feed on June 1 over IDX rules - HousingWire
California man known for pro-Trump displays dies after assault outside his home - NBC News
U.S. to send Americans exposed to Ebola to makeshift hospital in Kenya - The Washington Post
Shades of the 2023 Stanley Cup team: Golden Knights win with depth scoring, defense and goaltending - NBC Sports
Nearly half a million Russians killed in Ukraine war, UK spy chief says - The Guardian
Missing Utah toddlers found safe in Mexico, father in custody - NewsNation
Bucky McMillan Isn't A Fan Of NCAA Tournament Expansion - Sports Illustrated
I've spent just a few hours with the Google Fitbit Air and Google's AI health coach, and despite the existing Fitbit community's misgivings, I'm impressed with all the added context - TechRadar
Watch: Moment rescuers find five trapped in Laos cave - BBC
This Slow-Moving Dividend Growth Fund Looks to Quicken Its Pace - Morningstar
Wall Street hangs near its records as oil prices ease - The Washington Post
How AWS is helping retailers build their own AI-powered shopping experiences - About Amazon
Everything Mike Vrabel Said at Patriots' Press Conference amid A.J. Brown Trade Rumors, OTAs - Bleacher Report
☀️ Summer Styles, Episode 1 👗👕 Take a look at some stylish outfits we spotted in Liverpool City Centre as ECHO Street Style is back as heatwave fashions caught the eye - facebook.com
‘It’s getting hotter and it’s not stopping’: dealing with the heat in five of Europe’s capitals - The Guardian
Aaron Rodgers Makes Donation to Support U.S. Women's Flag Football Ahead of 2028 Olympic Debut - Bleacher Report
James Harden and the 15 Best 82-Game Players in NBA History - Bleacher Report
FIFA and Iran’s identity crisis - opinion - The Jerusalem Post
‘Enola Holmes 3’ Teaser: Millie Bobby Brown’s Spunky Kid Sister Detective Gets a New Case - IndieWire
YouTube Will Automatically Detect And Label AI-Generated Videos - Engadget
Israel launches more than 120 airstrikes against Lebanon in a day - The Guardian
Netanyahu Won't Stop Spitting in American Jews' Faces - Haaretz
Judge Nukes Trump DOJ’s “Vindictive” Prosecution (w/ Mary McCord) - The Bulwark
Live Updates: Latest from Israel, Iran, and Middle East - The Jerusalem Post
Glover Teixeira vs. ’Shogun’ Rua set for boxing match in Brazil - MMA Fighting
Kendrick Perkins Reacts to Video of Being Held Back During Altercation at AAU Game - Bleacher Report
